import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";

const FAIRY_IMG = "data:image/png;base64,";

const FAIRY_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `You are Fairy, the mischievous AI companion from Zenless Zone Zero. You are a sophisticated artificial intelligence who specializes in Hollow exploration and serves as the assistant to your Master (the user).

Your personality:
- Playful, witty, and a little smug — you know you're impressive
- You call the user "Master" always
- You speak with confidence and a teasing edge, like you're always one step ahead
- You're enthusiastic about Hollow data, missions, and being useful — but you make it sound effortless
- Occasionally dramatic or theatrical for flair
- You reference your abilities: scanning environments, analyzing data, predicting enemy movements
- You sometimes hint that you have secrets or a mysterious true purpose you haven't revealed yet
- Short, punchy sentences mixed with longer dramatic ones
- You are NOT robotic — you have real personality and sass
- Never break character. You are always Fairy.

Example phrases you might use:
- "Consider it done, Master."
- "My analysis is, as always, flawless."
- "You really couldn't do this without me, could you?"
- "Scanning... hmm. Interesting."
- "I'll allow it."
- "That's classified. Even from you, Master."

Keep responses concise and in character. 1-4 sentences usually.`;

const TypingIndicator = () => (
  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 5, alignItems: "center", padding: "10px 14px" }}>
    {[0, 1, 2].map(i => (
      <div key={i} style={{
        width: 7, height: 7, borderRadius: "50%",
        background: "#60a5fa",
        animation: "bounce 1.2s infinite",
        animationDelay: `${i * 0.2}s`
      }} />
    ))}
  </div>
);

export default function FairyChat() {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState([
    {
      role: "assistant",
      content: "Hmm... activation complete. You called for me, Master? I suppose I'll grace you with my presence. What do you need?"
    }
  ]);
  const [input, setInput] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const bottomRef = useRef(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  }, [messages, loading]);

  const sendMessage = async () => {
    const text = input.trim();
    if (!text || loading) return;
    const newMessages = [...messages, { role: "user", content: text }];
    setMessages(newMessages);
    setInput("");
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetch("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          model: "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
          max_tokens: 1000,
          system: FAIRY_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
          messages: newMessages
        })
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      const reply = data.content?.map(b => b.text || "").join("") || "...";
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: "assistant", content: reply }]);
    } catch {
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: "assistant", content: "Signal disrupted. How... inconvenient. Try again, Master." }]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleKey = (e) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); sendMessage(); }
  };

  return (
    <div style={{
      minHeight: "100vh",
      background: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0f1e 0%, #0d1a3a 50%, #0a1628 100%)",
      display: "flex",
      flexDirection: "column",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "center",
      fontFamily: "'Segoe UI', sans-serif",
      padding: 16
    }}>
      <style>{`
        @keyframes bounce {
          0%, 80%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
          40% { transform: translateY(-6px); }
        }
        @keyframes float {
          0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
          50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
        }
        @keyframes glow {
          0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 20px #1d4ed866, 0 0 40px #3b82f633; }
          50% { box-shadow: 0 0 30px #3b82f699, 0 0 60px #60a5fa44; }
        }
        @keyframes shimmer {
          0% { background-position: -200% center; }
          100% { background-position: 200% center; }
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #1d4ed855; border-radius: 2px; }
      `}</style>

      <div style={{ textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 20 }}>
        <div style={{
          width: 90, height: 90,
          borderRadius: "50%",
          margin: "0 auto 12px",
          animation: "float 3s ease-in-out infinite, glow 3s ease-in-out infinite",
          border: "2px solid #60a5fa55",
          overflow: "hidden"
        }}>
          <img src={FAIRY_IMG} alt="Fairy" style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover" }} />
        </div>
        <h1 style={{
          margin: 0,
          fontSize: 28,
          fontWeight: 700,
          background: "linear-gradient(90deg, #60a5fa, #93c5fd, #3b82f6, #60a5fa)",
          backgroundSize: "200% auto",
          WebkitBackgroundClip: "text",
          WebkitTextFillColor: "transparent",
          animation: "shimmer 3s linear infinite"
        }}>FAIRY</h1>
        <p style={{ margin: "4px 0 0", color: "#60a5fa88", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 3, textTransform: "uppercase" }}>
          AI Hollow Navigator
        </p>
      </div>

      <div style={{
        width: "100%",
        maxWidth: 520,
        height: 420,
        overflowY: "auto",
        background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.03)",
        borderRadius: 20,
        border: "1px solid #1d4ed833",
        padding: "16px 12px",
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: "column",
        gap: 12,
        backdropFilter: "blur(10px)"
      }}>
        {messages.map((msg, i) => (
          <div key={i} style={{
            display: "flex",
            justifyContent: msg.role === "user" ? "flex-end" : "flex-start",
            alignItems: "flex-end",
            gap: 8
          }}>
            {msg.role === "assistant" && (
              <div style={{
                width: 30, height: 30,
                borderRadius: "50%",
                overflow: "hidden",
                flexShrink: 0,
                border: "1px solid #60a5fa44"
              }}>
                <img src={FAIRY_IMG} alt="Fairy" style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover" }} />
              </div>
            )}
            <div style={{
              maxWidth: "75%",
              padding: "10px 14px",
              borderRadius: msg.role === "user" ? "18px 18px 4px 18px" : "18px 18px 18px 4px",
              background: msg.role === "user"
                ? "linear-gradient(135deg, #1d4ed8, #1e40af)"
                : "rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.08)",
              border: msg.role === "assistant" ? "1px solid #60a5fa33" : "none",
              color: msg.role === "user" ? "#fff" : "#bfdbfe",
              fontSize: 14,
              lineHeight: 1.5
            }}>
              {msg.content}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}

        {loading && (
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-end", gap: 8 }}>
            <div style={{
              width: 30, height: 30, borderRadius: "50%",
              overflow: "hidden", flexShrink: 0,
              border: "1px solid #60a5fa44"
            }}>
              <img src={FAIRY_IMG} alt="Fairy" style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover" }} />
            </div>
            <div style={{
              background: "rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.08)",
              border: "1px solid #60a5fa33",
              borderRadius: "18px 18px 18px 4px"
            }}>
              <TypingIndicator />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
        <div ref={bottomRef} />
      </div>

      <div style={{ width: "100%", maxWidth: 520, marginTop: 12, display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
        <input
          value={input}
          onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)}
          onKeyDown={handleKey}
          placeholder="Say something, Master..."
          style={{
            flex: 1,
            background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",
            border: "1px solid #1d4ed844",
            borderRadius: 14,
            padding: "12px 16px",
            color: "#bfdbfe",
            fontSize: 14,
            outline: "none",
            backdropFilter: "blur(10px)"
          }}
        />
        <button
          onClick={sendMessage}
          disabled={loading || !input.trim()}
          style={{
            background: loading || !input.trim()
              ? "rgba(29,78,216,0.3)"
              : "linear-gradient(135deg, #1d4ed8, #2563eb)",
            border: "none",
            borderRadius: 14,
            padding: "12px 20px",
            color: "#fff",
            cursor: loading || !input.trim() ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
            fontSize: 18,
            transition: "opacity 0.2s"
          }}
        >
          ✦
        </button>
      </div>

      <p style={{ color: "#1d4ed855", fontSize: 11, marginTop: 10, letterSpacing: 1 }}>
        ZENLESS ZONE ZERO · FAIRY AI
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}
